name: Gusto Swing (Gusto 8)
capacity: 390 items, 48 selections (24 snack, 8 food, 16 bottles), 7 trays
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £4,200 ex VAT. Gusto Swing is now branded Gusto 8. Dual/triple temperature zones (0-4°C food, 8-15°C snack). Specs from Necta/Evoca site.

name: Orchestra Combo
capacity: Up to 464 items, 8 spirals max, 6 trays max
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £4,400 ex VAT. Metallic frame supports up to 54kg of products. Max power 630W. Temp range 3-12°C. Specs from Necta/Evoca official site.

name: Crane Voce
capacity: 12-18 selections, 600 x 7-9oz cups or 400 x 12oz cups (max 800 cups)
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £1,600 ex VAT. Hot drinks machine with 2 ground coffees, 3 solubles, sugar, cream, milk. Specs from Crane technical manual.

name: Bevmax 2 (incl. contactless)
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £1,600 ex VAT. Includes contactless payment. 9-inch touchscreen with full-motion video. Specs from CPI/Crane official site.

name: Necta Sfera
capacity: Up to 48 selections, 300-500 products (3 snack trays, 2 bottle trays, 1 can tray)
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £1,750 ex VAT. Power 650W, 230V/50Hz. Double tempered glass. Remote monitoring via GSM. Specs from Necta manual.

name: Klix Outlook (hot drinks)
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £1,100 ex VAT. In-cup technology — one-touch operation. 115kg hot-only, 132kg hot/cold variant. Weight shown is hot-only.

name: Crane Shopper 2
capacity: Up to 225 products, 9 rotating shelves with individual compartments
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £2,500 ex VAT. Fresh food rotating drum machine. 9 levels with 127mm vend doors. 220/240V AC. Specs from Lavazza Pro UK.

name: Crane BevMax
capacity: 35-45 selections, 405 x 12oz cans or 360 x 16-20oz bottles
dimensions: H1830 x W1194 x D813mm (47" wide model)
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £1,100 ex VAT. Original BevMax Classic. 5 trays. Specs from CPI/Crane official site (converted from imperial).

name: Crane Evolution
capacity: ~600 x 7oz cups, hot/cold/hot water from 3 dispense positions
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £1,250 ex VAT. Paperless double brewer for fresh coffee/tea. Adjustable sugar and flavour levels. Specs from Vending2Go.

name: Crane Focus
dimensions: H1830 x W812-968 x D724mm (compact to standard)
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £1,400 ex VAT. SureVend delivery sensor standard. Shelves tilt to 45° for easy loading. Weight 237kg (compact) / 304kg (standard). Specs from multiple UK vendor sites.

name: Azkoyen Palma+ H70
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £1,500 ex VAT. Compact machine. Interior temp 3°C guaranteed at 32°C/65% humidity exterior. 500W, 230V/50Hz. Double toughened glass, LED lighting. Specs from Azkoyen Vending official site.

name: Crane Climate
capacity: 297-312 items, 20-36 selections (snack + bottle + optional food trays)
notes: HIGH confidence — confirmed Vendtrade price £1,750 ex VAT. Dual temperature with adjustable divider separating perishable from non-perishable. Available in 20/16 and 15/5/16 configs. Specs from Vendtrade product page.

name: SandenVendo G-Snack (with Elevator + Fridge)
capacity: Dual temperature zones for perishable and non-perishable
notes: MEDIUM confidence — ex-showroom price £3,602 ex VAT from Intelligent Vending (never field-installed, used for demos/testing). Patented coupling system, innovative elevator, double tempered glass. Specs from product listing.

name: Nayax VPOS Touch
payment_systems: Contactless, Chip & PIN, Apple Pay, Google Pay
notes: Cashless payment terminal. £10/month subscription + 2.95% per transaction. Confirmed price from Breaktime Solutions.
